top_signals.title: Intel rises 9% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
top_signals.summary: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.

top_signals.title: Venture Global, EnBW Ink New LNG Supply Deals
top_signals.summary: U.S. liquefied natural gas producer (LNG) Venture Global and German utility EnBW have signed new binding agreements for the supply of approximately 0.82 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) of LNG over a period of about five years beginning in 2026.The…
